title: What's new in Google Cloud's agent platform
summary: Google Cloud announced its updated agent platform featuring a unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform with Agent Builder for no-code/low-code agent creation, an Agent Registry and marketplace for distributing reusable components, and enterprise governance tools including observability, evaluation, and simulation capabilities. The platform includes an expanded Agent Development Kit with language support and native agent-to-agent communication.
writeup: The video covers Google Cloud's updated agent platform, centered on a unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform. Key components include Agent Builder for no-code and low-code agent creation, an Agent Registry and marketplace for distributing reusable components, and an expanded Agent Development Kit with broader language support and native agent-to-agent communication. The platform also adds enterprise governance tooling: observability, evaluation, and simulation capabilities for multi-agent systems.
